assertions: D7: Reader dynamically populated with real chapters and book TOC titles.

vision_verdict: pass. The interface displays a clean, organized dashboard for the Fahem Sandbox, showing the "Interactive Knowledge Library" with fully functional navigation menus. The content layout is consistent, presenting "All Libraries" and "All Subjects" correctly within their designated containers. The walkthrough modal is clearly presented and correctly positioned over the interface, maintaining a coherent structure for the user onboarding process. Everything appears to be well-aligned and functioning as intended within the sandbox environment.
